reviews.review_description: Was great, my son absolutely loved this game. Then one day it stopped appearing in our installed apps, shows in settings for notifications, but not in installed games. I can see it on my phone, tried to uninstall and reinstall, but won't uninstall. $30 down the drain

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed oppurtunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I dont see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I recieved a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.
At the end I expected to be a bird, but iam not. If there’s going to be a second game we better be a bird. But yet again we need another chosen one to hatch so maybe not.
I love this game

Unfortunately, I was going to give it a good rating, but I encountered a progression issue. During the Octopus fight, when I hit with the divine power of lightning, nothing happens. I tried reinstalling the game, but nothing. I don't have time to reload a save to see if that might fix the problem.
EDIT : I did a SECOND playthough (New save game spot), and I'm getting the exact same issue ... :( I can't continue to play the game.

Great Journey with some deep atmosphere. Some expansion Will be great but overal nice theme. Player on Hard with some challenging aspects.
4,3 Star. Recommended.💪

Ok so I love magic in games but like there are not that many good ones but I loved the way they did this. Like time stop was awesome.
I do have one problem though, so I was at the very end of the story and spent like an hour on a pretty easy fight that just never ended and then quit cause I was bored but I would still recommend.

Honestly it’s an amazing game and my favorite I’ve done all levels of difficulty’s and wish they added more levels I barley play on the oculus now because I’ve finished the game definitely worth the money but please add more
So underrated, need a 2nd game or a similar experience to this even years after playing it i still think about this game

reviews.review_title: This is the best VR game of all time
reviews.review_description: I've played the game countless times but i cant stop. It's just perfect I would pay any amount of money for a sequel. The story line is perfect the god powers are the best of any game the enemies and learning how to beat them is so fun. I love the work put it in defintley a Recommend
Please.

This game was the first vr game I bought and my lord was it fun! The story was engaging, characters were interesting even if they were silent and the world was full of life. I pray we get a sequel for this but we probably won’t 😔

My love for this game started when I was surfing the store for something to keep me occupied thats when i came across it and its demo I looked at the trailers and knew I had to have it but I wanted to make sure it wasn't a waste of my money so I tried the demo when I tried the demo I absolutely loved it, it was just what I was looking for and more. I bought the game and my family probably didn't see my actual face for a few days just my oculus practically glued to my face. When I completed the whole game I was so sad I had completed the game due to my love for this game now when I'm bored I start a game and sometimes pull a all nighter just to play it this is my favorite game the details are just enough and most of the times when a character in a game has a face its creepy but this has no face which was great. I highly recommend it if you love fantasy, action, and exploring. This game is the best.

Brilliant , love it . Only problem is, I been playing  8 years now and have never gotten to level 1 of 4.  Tried  and nothing. Software won’t progress. Uninstall. reinstall soooo many times no good. as you can imagine bit fed up now.  I kid you not, l’ve had all the headsets  from day one , no joy.

I enjoyed playing this game very much. I was gonna try it out again using my Kat Walk via PCVR, but the PC ver doesn't work any more.

Still a great game :-)
One of the most polished games on Quest (from the makers of Left4Dead + Back4Blood). Walkthroughs are on Youtube if you need them for this stunning RPG.

reviews.review_title: This game was very fun until the kraken
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game until the kraken fight, it was horrible to play. Way to difficult, god mode didn't last nearly long enough to do damage and save the villagers, throwing lightning feels horrible and barely works, the cooldown was way to long and I felt like all I could do was sit back and  watch the villagers die and I felt horrible for it. I don't know why but I felt bad for the fake people I couldn't save, it felt like it was my fault they died and I may or may not have cried.
It has taken a week to download. I don't know if it's just me so I rated it five stars. It took WAYYY too long.
It starts fun then it gets to one level where you can not pass and it drains your powers and you can’t use the can’t use them, so if you could please fix this thank you
This game is a$$ the fighting is terrible and it’s super short story that isn’t even good it’s the biggest waste of money
At the last part of the game (I think) I couldn’t find the grandma to get back to the temple and she just wouldn’t spawn
Poor movement

reviews.review_title: Why is this a VR game?
reviews.review_description: What this game lacks in interesting content or graphics it makes up in length of play I guess. I found it pretty boring and repetitive. The graphics are basic as can be.

This is an immersive game that feels rewarding to play. It feels great to upgrade your equipment. The game doesn't teach you how to defeat the different types of enemies. Some are more tricky than others. Expect to die and see what works.

There were times where the game glitched. Once in the tutorial I couldn't collect the last bit of belief to progress so I had to start over, and second the "peak-a-boo" enemy froze and I couldn't kill it until I got the Geo fists. This game hasn't been updated since quest 2 came out. 

If you're new to VR or have only played games that use teleportation to move you probably will experience motion sickness playing this. What helps me is to swing your arm and imitate running forwards. Also try to avoid moving in a direction you're not looking at like walking backwards. Straight side to side movements felt fine though. 

I'm having fun with this game and I'd recommend it to anyone who has read this far.

This is a very good game but After a couple hours it got kinda boring and if your new to VR it could cause some nausea or motion sickness and I know this from showing it to friends. I would return this but I’ve played for more than 2 hours sooo i don’t really know what to do with this game
The price for this game was certainly not worth it

reviews.review_title: One of the best journey quest games
reviews.review_description: I finally be eat journey of the gods at 10:48 pm  on April 14 2021 and I have to say I enjoy every moment in this game the graphic were amazing 10/10 the story was easy to figure out 10/10 the gameplay was unique 10/10 it made you feel like your in the game it was one of the best games like legend of Zelda games I ever played honestly this is the first VR game I beat. 😊😊 I recommend you check this out 10/10. 🗡️ 🛡️
I Loves It! 1+
Honestly ots a good game but you cannot backtrack to previace lvls and when you are done you still can not go back also replayabilaty is. Weak
It is the first game I bought in my VR and it is a lot of fun, adventuring around, cute graphics and storyline.

I was skeptical if i was making the correct choice when purchasing this game, but oh my god this make is stunning. The art style is very simplistic but it is done super well, the lighting is amazing, the level design is genius, and it is littered with secrets to explore. The upgrading system is interesting, i love how it makes real changes to your items, for example when you upgrade your sword it gets longer and you can feel this when in combat. This game deserves five stars.
Won’t let me refund and said I play 2 hours with it and didn’t even play one!
So I bought this today and I am always 22% through my first game. I played for hours. It’s so much fun and really good!!! Love that you can set your dominate hands!
I would buy this game if it even cost $50

reviews.review_title: My favorite Quest 2 Game So Far..
reviews.review_description: Super fun - yet familiar rpg/exploring/puzzle concept. The game play is very smooth and immersive. I took one star away because I do wish there was dialog with more of the NPCs, I feel like that was a total miss.
I'm new to vr and this game is a great way to step into the virtual world. It's family friendly but still fun for an adult.
This is my first game so have no comparison but I really like it. It’s slow enough for me, I am 63  and still learning though. But for me it’s perfect at the moment.
Amazing game

Just wish there was a way to customise the controller, but besides that's it's pretty fun and an alright looking game 

I'm still on the protect the egg level and haven't fully completed it, I just it will be great.
